dataset: SRP009896 maize GBS inline barcode demultiplexing

ena.experiment_title: Illumina Genome Analyzer IIx sequencing: GBS sequencing of NAM plate 61VBPAAXX_1

note: ENA exposes FASTQ files for the SRP009896 runs. Provide --barcodes-file or --barcodes-url to install the matching sample/barcode sheet before running comparative demux benchmarks. The public Cutadapt example links a Google Drive ExampleDataset.zip that includes the FASTQ files and barcode file; this script avoids downloading that full archive by default.
